criteria.name: AI Features
criteria.description: The range and effectiveness of AI-powered functionalities offered by the app, such as automatic enhancements, style transfers, and object recognition.
criteria.sources: App feature descriptions, user reviews, developer documentation.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: The overall ease of use, interface design, and user satisfaction with the app.
criteria.sources: User reviews, app ratings, usability studies.

criteria.name: Performance
criteria.description: The speed and reliability of the app during various operations, including processing times and stability.
criteria.sources: Performance benchmarks, user feedback, developer notes.

criteria.name: Popularity
criteria.description: The app's user base size and engagement levels, indicating its acceptance and usage in the market.
criteria.sources: Download statistics, active user counts, social media mentions.

criteria.name: Cost
criteria.description: The pricing model of the app, including free, freemium, or paid options, and the value it offers relative to its price.
criteria.sources: App store listings, developer websites, user reviews.
